questions.prompt: Which of these are prerequisites for the direct M365 ITDR integration? (Select all that apply.)
choices: A Microsoft 365 user with Global Administrator role
Audit logs enabled in Microsoft 365 (Huntress will attempt to enable if disabled)
At least one active Exchange Online license in the tenant
The customer's third-party MFA provider's API key
questions.explanation: Admin in Huntress, Global Admin in M365, audit logs on, and an Exchange Online license are the documented prerequisites. Third-party MFA isn't part of the integration; Huntress only reports Microsoft MFA via Authenticator as Enabled.

questions.prompt: Huntress ITDR will retroactively detect malicious logins that happened before the integration was enabled.
questions.explanation: Per the FAQ, ITDR detects existing malicious inbox rules but does not detect historical malicious logins. The detection set is forward-looking from integration time.
